case_title: NIEGHBORHOOD HOUSING RENEWAL CORPORATION, III vs. DIEP, DAVID et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NIEGHBORHOOD HOUSING RENEWAL CORPORATION, III RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIEP, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 575 EDDY ST #305, LEASE FORFEITED
